holdings.infoBox: JHAC is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings.

overview.description: The John Hancock Fundamental All Cap Core ETF (JHAC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed, non-transparent fund of US companies across the entire market-cap spectrum, selected using a bottom-up fundamental approach. The fund utilizes the Fidelity non-transparent model. JHAC was launched on Oct 31, 2023 and is issued by John Hancock.
